scenario.name: IMS Call UAC Demo
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Authorization: Digest username="[field0]@[field1]",realm="[field1]",uri="sip:[field1]",nonce="",response="" User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

INVITE tel:+86[field10] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];dir=mo;branch=[branch];rport Route: <sip:mo@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <tel:+86[field9]>;tag=[call_number] To: <tel:+86[field10]> Call-ID: [field9]///[call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> P-Preferred-Identity: <sip:[field9]@[field1]> P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=460011[field0] Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, UPDATE, OPTIONS User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=[field9] 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:96 0-15 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 [routes] Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <tel:+86[field9]>;tag=[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [field9]///[call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 [routes] Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <tel:+86[field9]>;tag=[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [field9]///[call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=460011[field0] P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=IMS-SIPp-[call_id];orig-ioi=[field1] User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Length: 0
